description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a global before_script that runs `node -v` and installs dependencies with `npx yarn install --pure-lockfile --emoji false --no-progress --non-interactive`. In the deploy stage define a pages job that sets NODE_ENV=production, runs `npx yarn build --prod --pure-lockfile --emoji false --no-progress --non-interactive` then `npx next export -o public`, publishes the public/ folder as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Also add a yarn_lint job (default stage) that runs `npx yarn lint`.
